title: Spring 每周动态 - 2026 年 4 月 7 日
author: joshlong
content:
Hi Spring fans! Welcome to another installment of This Week in Spring! It's April 7th, 2026, and I'm on the road! I started the journey for the amazing Voxxed Days Amsterdam show and am now winding my way through France. I visited Colmar, a beautiful city from which the animators on Disney's Beauty and the Beast drew some inspiration. Now I'm off to Lyon, to see some of my French colleagues and explore one of the centers of gastronomy in the world. Then, it's off to Paris, where I'll be speaking at the Java User Group this Thursday! If you're local, don't miss it (ne le ratez pas!)

In the meantime, we've got a ton of stuff to go over so let's dive right into it.

  • I was very happy to sit and chat with Oracle Java developer advocate Ana-Maria Mihalceanu in last week's installment of A Bootiful Podcast
  • Spring Cloud 2025.0.2 (aka Northfields) has been released
  • Another banger from Spring AI lead Christian Tsolov on AI agentic patterns with Spring AI, this time looking at auto memory with the new AutoMemoryTools to provide persistent agent memory across sessions
  • I love this post from a member of the JobRunr community talking about their new openclaw-alike built on top of the world-class Spring AI, Spring Boot, and JobRunr, a distributed scheduling engine, entitled:

How We Built an Java AI Agent by Connecting the Dots in the Ecosystem

  • This is an awesome look at how Trivago uses Spring Boot and GraalVM at scale.
  • I have been loving Craig Walls' Spring AI Recipes! His latest looks at using Spring AI's ChatClient for a lightweight chat loop.
  • Did you see the JetBrains team's blog on using Spring Data JPA more elegantly with Kotlin? JPA has its place, but the requirement that it controls the stateful mutations of the entities makes it very verbose when used with either Java or Kotlin. Especially when compared to every other ORM I can think of, including MyBatis, JOOQ, Spring Data JDBC, JDBI, JetBrains' Exposed, etc. So I was very happy to see this blog post!
  • This is a very interesting comparison between LangChain4j and Spring AI (and I love how well Spring AI did)
  • Eeeenteresting post: fake it till you make it: fault injection with Spring using headers and baggage propagation
  • I really enjoyed this amazing look at the extent to which Apero CAS has gone to efficiently test their Spring-based open-source project - 12000+ tests! - using Spring!
aiSummary: Spring 生态系统的全面每周综述，涵盖 Spring Cloud 发布、Spring AI 智能体模式、大规模 GraalVM 迁移以及 Kotlin 结合 JPA 的最佳实践。
oneSentenceSummary: Spring 生态系统的全面每周综述，涵盖 Spring Cloud 发布、Spring AI 智能体模式、大规模 GraalVM 迁移以及 Kotlin 结合 JPA 的最佳实践。
summary: 本期“Spring 每周动态”精选了 Java 和 Spring 领域的最新进展。主要亮点包括 Spring Cloud 2025.0.2 (Northfields) 的发布，以及 Spring AI 的新进展，重点介绍了利用 AutoMemoryTools 实现持久化智能体记忆。文章还介绍了真实世界的案例研究，例如 Trivago 的大规模 GraalVM 迁移以及海量 Spring Boot 应用的测试策略。此外，还涵盖了开发体验的改进，如在 Kotlin 中使用 Spring Data JPA，以及 Spring AI 与 LangChain4j 的对比。

mainPoints.point: Spring AI 正在通过新的智能体模式和持久化记忆工具取得进展。
mainPoints.explanation: AutoMemoryTools 的引入使开发人员能够提供跨会话的持久化智能体记忆，增强了 AI 驱动的 Java 应用的能力。

mainPoints.point: 企业级 GraalVM Native Image 的应用正在走向成熟。
mainPoints.explanation: Trivago 将 GraphQL 服务迁移到 GraalVM Native Image，展示了原生编译在大规模 Spring Boot 环境中的性能和可扩展性优势。

mainPoints.point: Java 生态系统正通过协作工具成功集成 AI。
mainPoints.explanation: 通过连接 Spring AI、Spring Boot 和 JobRunr，开发人员正在构建分布式 AI 智能体，证明了现有 Java 生态系统在处理 AI 工作负载方面的稳健性。

mainPoints.point: 现代测试和数据访问模式对于大规模 Spring 应用至关重要。
mainPoints.explanation: 像 Apero CAS 这样的案例研究展示了如何将测试扩展到超过 12，000 个用例，而 JetBrains 则提供了关于在 Kotlin 中使 JPA 更优雅的见解。

keyQuotes: Spring AI 负责人 Christian Tsolov 谈论 Spring AI 的智能体模式，此次重点介绍了新的 AutoMemoryTools，旨在提供跨会话的持久化智能体记忆。
深入了解 Trivago 的 GraalVM 迁移：大规模 GraphQL 的原生镜像。
Spring AI 对比 LangChain4j：我们构建了两次相同的 AI 智能体，其中一个保持了可调试性。
测试一个包含 400 个模块的 Spring Boot 应用：真正可扩展的模式。
